title: Add Dark Pictures to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Dark Pictures](https://www.dark.pictures) to image
- Create dark-themed images with Dark Pictures, a web-based platform offering tools to transform ordinary visuals into moody, dramatic compositions.

Fixes #9956

gist.headline: A moody new bloom
gist.blurb: The greenhouse just got a little more dramatic. We've added Dark Pictures to the ecosystem for all your moody, dark-themed image generation needs.
gist.summary: Added the Dark Pictures app to the community greenhouse directory, providing tools to transform ordinary visuals into moody, dramatic compositions.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and access Dark Pictures directly from the pollinations.ai apps list to generate dark-themed imagery.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot admiring a cute but moody painting in the greenhouse. Contrasting the 'dark' theme of the app with the mandatory warm, cozy, pastel aesthetic of the brand.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny black beret and the chunky Monitor Robot admiring a cute nighttime painting on a wooden easel inside a bright, blooming greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm ambient lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny black beret and the chunky Monitor Robot admiring a cute nighttime painting on a wooden easel inside a bright, blooming greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm ambient lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
